events.label: assistant
events.text: The observed sequence is the controlling issue: final alignment taken before the pipe system was fully connected does not validate the installed machine condition, because the final pipe connection can move the equipment through pipe strain.

events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ve written the assessment file. I’m doing a quick JSON parse check so the output is machine-readable.
